title: Hanuman Mantra
intro: Read the Hanuman Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Hanuman.
description:
Om Hanumate Namaha॥
Om, I bow down to Lord Hanuman, the remover of all obstacles and the symbol of strength and devotion.

faq.q1: When should Hanuman Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Hanuman Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning, evening, or on Tuesdays and Saturdays.
faq.q2: How many times should Hanuman Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Hanuman Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting Hanuman Mantra is believed to bring courage, confidence, positive energy, and the blessings of Lord Hanuman.
faq.a4: Yes, students may chant Hanuman Mantra to seek focus, confidence, and inner strength.
faq.q5: Can Hanuman Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, Hanuman Mantra can be chanted daily with devotion.
